tasks.title: 📰 Central Norway News Scraper - Daily Lead Generation
tasks.description:
## Task Description

Set up automated news scraper that monitors newspapers from Trøndelag and Møre og Romsdal for articles about inefficient workflows and digitalization opportunities.

## Implementation

- **Schedule**: Daily at 10:00 AM
- **Sources**: Adresseavisen, Trønder-Avisa, Sunnmørsposten, Tidens Krav, Romsdals Budstikke, Fosna-Folket
- **Keywords**: ineffektiv, tungvint, rapporteringskrav, digitalisering, etc. (Norwegian)
- **Output**: Slack notification with top 5 leads including contact info

## Status

- ✅ Scraper script created (scraper/news_scraper.py)
- ✅ Cron job configured in OpenClaw
- ⏳ Awaiting Slack webhook for notifications
- ⏳ Pending first test run

## Next Steps

1. Set SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL environment variable
2. Run manual test
3. Monitor daily results
